title: Speedsters Datapack EXTRAS
description: Speedsters Datapack By ThePjotyr but with a bit of extra content.
body:
# IMPORTANT
I want to start by saying I DID NOT write this from the ground up. It is a heavily modified version of ThePjotyr's Speedster datapack, which can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/thepjotyrs-speedsters).
# New Content
## Speedster Suits
I have added a total of 6 new speedster suits, most of which are based on The CW Flash TV series. To see the suits equipped on armor stands, refer to the gallery. The recipes for the new suits are:
### Future Flash
Based on Future Flash's Comic appearance.

Armor Recipes:

![Future Flash Armor Crafting Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2325d72f85fd867cfa8345f6557ad54cb2dd7a28.png)

### Godspeed
Based on August Heart/Godspeed from the CW TV series.

Armor Recipes:

![Godspeed Armor Crafting Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a62c2e8d9cde0cbbc0b2cb29eba747be95310d41.png)

### Jay Garrick
Based on Jay Garrick's Flash design.

Armor Recipes:

![Jay Garrick Armor Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37a56fb2844b038bfca32e3e5bcdfd126279c1ee_0.webp)

### The Rival
Based on the (very underwhelming) Rival suit from the CW TV series.

Armor Recipes:

![The Rival Armor Crafting Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b64ba1e060fc00ac581fc9d1d3184c26e9920532.png)

### Savitar
Based on Savitar from the CW TV series, this is the most practical speedster suit, as it uses netherite armor as a base instead of leather. Additionally, crafting the chestplate will also craft Savitar's Blade.

Armor Recipes:

![Savitar Armor Crafting Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22e8fb1ebfd1b0861e6cbefe14496720e2f86670_0.webp)

Savitar's Blade:

![Savitar's Blade sitting in a glow item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/015a69eb1ec3358c7742193910b73094c937ad71.png)

Stats:

![Item Stats For Savitar's Blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8901f7420bfee7e291efa24983458424a9572a73.png)

### Kid Flash
Based on Wally West/Kid Flash from the CW TV series.

Armor Recipes:

![Kid Flash Armor Crafting Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22df9f2e41bd347747c05bb17d7830d3c703f323.png)

## New Items
### Dark Matter Demolecularizer
A handy tool used for removing your speed. It can't be used on other players, just yourself.

Recipe:

![dark Matter Demolecularizer Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c6044a2be898477c4f660bf65b1b1a79237db4f.png)

Item Texture:

![Item Texture For Dark Matter Demolecularizer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00131557c664ff33a924584b4a26b22c9d7dde7e.png)

### The Philosopher's Stone
This is a craftable artifact that grants you one of the three new speed sources when right-clicked (More on those below).

Recipe:

![Philosophers' Stone Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9b64de819a26c25be3aae5e929996197177557e.png)

Item Texture:

![Item Texture For Philosopher's Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5139b1e4a060440a4038f0147ea1dbe52b18aeb7.png)

### Velocity X/Velocity 10
An upgrade for Velocity 9, this drink will grant you another new speed source. It's recipe is designed to be V9's recipe, but inverted.

Recipe:

![Velocity X Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9c0ff7bd4ef0709ce1ea9bed97eaa073bb10de3.png)

Item Texture:

![Velocity X Item Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31c185267a3822bcc8e0c40a4bfa81a4e1507cdd.png)

### Condensed Velocity X
Designed to be hundreds of bottles of VX condensed into one, this will connect you to the final new speed source.

Recipe:

![Condensed VX Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a96207c2fdd9fa22512b47734566555ca6c67b1.png)

Item Texture:

![Texture For Condensed VX](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d2772aaf11fc0601ea0a8feda7a63bf69baeab2.png)

## New Speed Sources
### The Philosopher's Stone

Right clicking while holding the item of the same name will give you the Philosopher's Stone speed source. The acceleration speed is a bit faster than using Velocity 9 and the lightning is aqua-colored, designed to match Savitar and Future Flash.
An example:

![Speed Effects: Philosopher's Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eae3ec11fa8376333e6fcd13cb4fb5046c81700_0.webp)

### Velocity X
This speed source can be obtained by drinking the Velocity X potion, similarly to Velocity 9. Unlike V9, however, Velocity X has NO DRAWBACKS. You can use this speed source forever without dying. It stands at roughly the same acceleration speed as Velocity 9, which is still faster than the Speedforce and the Negative Speedforce. The lightning, however, is colored its usual blue, along with gold, to show that it's more pure.

![Velocity X Effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42d2811d27a5e656122baeb200f44ca3cffd2410_0.webp)

### White Lightning
This source can be obtained by consuming Condensed Velocity X and has the fastest acceleration of any other source. Based on Godspeed's lightning from the CW TV show, all the spark effects are white.

![White Lightning Effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72ef314bed3a336d35f4fa742e04b570dc0c8b6e_0.webp)

# Funtions
These are all the new functions added in this version.
### Speed Sources

```
/function tp_source:velocityx - Velocity X Source
/function tp_source:philosopher - Philosopher's Stone Source
/function tp_source:white - White Lightning Source
```

### Items


```
/function tp_speed_item:condensed_vx - Condensed VX item
/function tp_speed_item:dark_matter_demo - Dark Matter Demolecularizer item
/function tp_speed_item:philosophers_stone - Philosopher's Stone item

/function tp_speed_item:future_flash_helmet - Future Flash Helmet item
/function tp_speed_item:future_flash_chestplate - Future Flash Chestplate item
/function tp_speed_item:future_flash_leggings - Future Flash Leggings item
/function tp_speed_item:future_flash_boots - Future Flash Boots item
/function tp_speed_item:future_flash_suit - Full Future Flash Suit items
/function tp_speed_item:future_flash_ring - Future Flash Ring item

/function tp_speed_item:godspeed_helmet - Godspeed Helmet item
/function tp_speed_item:godspeed_chestplate - Godspeed Chestplate item
/function tp_speed_item:godspeed_leggings - Godspeed Leggings item
/function tp_speed_item:godspeed_boots - Godspeed Boots item
/function tp_speed_item:godspeed_suit - Full Godspeed Suit items
/function tp_speed_item:godspeed_ring - Godspeed Ring item

/function tp_speed_item:jay_helmet - Jay Garrick Helmet item
/function tp_speed_item:jay_chestplate - Jay Garrick Chestplate item
/function tp_speed_item:jay_leggings - Jay Garrick Leggings item
/function tp_speed_item:jay_boots - Jay Garrick Boots item
/function tp_speed_item:jay_suit - Full Jay Garrick Suit items
/function tp_speed_item:jay_ring - Jay Garrick Ring item

/function tp_speed_item:kidflash_helmet - Kid Flash Helmet item
/function tp_speed_item:kidflash_chestplate - Kid Flash Chestplate item
/function tp_speed_item:kidflash_leggings - Kid Flash Leggings item
/function tp_speed_item:kidflash_boots - Kid Flash Boots item
/function tp_speed_item:kidflash_suit - Full Kid Flash Suit items
/function tp_speed_item:kidflash_ring - Kid Flash Ring item

/function tp_speed_item:rival_helmet - The Rival Helmet item
/function tp_speed_item:rival_chestplate - The Rival Chestplate item
/function tp_speed_item:rival_leggings - The Rival Leggings item
/function tp_speed_item:rival_boots - The Rival Boots item
/function tp_speed_item:rival_suit - Full The Rival Suit items
/function tp_speed_item:rival_ring - The Rival Ring item

/function tp_speed_item:savitar_helmet - Savitar Helmet item
/function tp_speed_item:savitar_chestplate - Savitar Chestplate item
/function tp_speed_item:savitar_blade - Savitar's Blade item
/function tp_speed_item:savitar_leggings - Savitar Leggings item
/function tp_speed_item:saitar_boots - Savitar Boots item
/function tp_speed_item:savitar_suit - Full Savitar Suit items
/function tp_speed_item:savitar_ring - Savitar Ring item
```


## All Screenshots Captured Using [Complementary shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined).

## REMEMBER TO SUPPORT THE CREATOR [HERE](https://modrinth.com/datapack/thepjotyrs-speedsters)!
